Tag Archive

Stories Tagged "Lost World Record"

A focused archive path for Lost World Record, collecting 10 related Kyunolab records across 1 shelf.

Lost Worlds

The Atlas Supplement Page for a Country Under Glass

The Atlas Supplement Page for a Country Under Glass follows an atlas supplement page describes a country preserved beneath glass as if geography were an exhibit, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 8 min read
Lost Worlds

The Census Index of a Town Between Two Borders

The Census Index of a Town Between Two Borders follows a census index names a town that appears between borders but belongs to neither side, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 10 min read
Lost Worlds

The Expedition Ration Ledger With One Impossible Day

The Expedition Ration Ledger With One Impossible Day follows an expedition ration ledger records one extra day of supplies after the route should have ended, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 8 min read
Lost Worlds

The Harbor Chart Labeling a Port Under the Desert

The Harbor Chart Labeling a Port Under the Desert follows a harbor chart labels a port where later maps show only desert, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 9 min read
Lost Worlds

The Library Card Catalog for the City of Blue Roofs

The Library Card Catalog for the City of Blue Roofs follows a library card catalog preserves books filed under a city of blue roofs that no atlas can place, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 8 min read
Lost Worlds

The Orchard Survey Record Beneath the Old Platform

The Orchard Survey Record Beneath the Old Platform follows an orchard survey record beneath a rail platform points to a landscape erased by transit, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 10 min read
Lost Worlds

The Pilgrim Passport Stamp From a Vanished Gate

The Pilgrim Passport Stamp From a Vanished Gate follows a pilgrim passport stamp marks a gate removed from every later route guide, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 8 min read
Lost Worlds

The Railway Cargo Book Bound for an Unlisted Valley

The Railway Cargo Book Bound for an Unlisted Valley follows a railway cargo book sends crates to a valley absent from timetables and survey maps, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 9 min read
Lost Worlds

The Royal Tax Roll for a Kingdom That Sank Inland

The Royal Tax Roll for a Kingdom That Sank Inland follows a royal tax roll preserves payments from a kingdom said to have sunk far from the sea, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 9 min read
Lost Worlds

The School Map With a Continent Folded Into the Margin

The School Map With a Continent Folded Into the Margin follows a school map hides a small continent in the folded margin of the paper, showing how ordinary paperwork can become the center of a legend, mystery, or symbolic tradition.

Lost Worlds - 10 min read

Kyunolab Mystery Archive is a quiet story publication by Kyuno Lab, dedicated to legends, folklore, mysteries, and strange tales from the edges of memory.
